mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description FROM permissions WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, description FROM permissions WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permissions rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.name, p.description FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permissions rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN roles r ON rp.role_id = r.id INNER JOIN user_roles ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, name, description FROM permissions
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO permissions (id, name, description) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM role_permissions WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND permission_id = #{permissionId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM permissions WHERE name = #{name}
